welcome.heading: Storage
welcome.intro: View your local data or manage your family trees in the cloud.

cloud.intro: Save multiple family trees in the cloud and load them on any device.
cloud.loginWarn: You are not logged in. Log in via the top bar to manage cloud family trees.
cloud.upgradeBody: Cloud storage is available for owners and admins. Upgrade your account via Ko-fi to save and share unlimited family trees.
cloud.saveIntro: Save your current local family tree as new, or overwrite an existing one.
cloud.empty: No family trees saved in the cloud yet.

shared.intro: Family trees shared with you by other users. You can load and view them. Editors can also save changes.
shared.loginWarn: You are not logged in. Log in via the top bar to view shared family trees.
shared.empty: No family trees shared with you yet.

modal.title: Unsaved changes
modal.body: Your local data contains unsaved changes. What would you like to do before loading "{{naam}}"?

confirm.reset:
⚠️ WARNING ⚠️

All data will be deleted.
Make an export first.
Click OK to confirm.
confirm.load:
Do you want to load "{{naam}}"?

This will overwrite your current local data.
Make an export first if you want to keep it.
confirm.overwrite: Do you want to overwrite "{{naam}}" with your current local data?
confirm.delete:
Do you want to permanently delete "{{naam}}" from the cloud?

This cannot be undone.
confirm.leave:
Do you want to leave the collaboration on "{{naam}}"?

You will lose access to this family tree.

status.noName: ⚠️ Give the family tree a name.
status.left: ✅ You have left the collaboration on "{{naam}}".

error.noCloudAccess: ❌ Cloud storage is only available for owners. Upgrade your account via Ko-fi.

share.title: 🔗 Share family tree: {{naam}}
share.intro: Invite users as viewer (read only) or editor (read and edit). Any user with an account can be invited.
share.fillEmail: Please fill in an email address.
